title: More(k) Borg - Trapped Within & Glimpses
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sXRGp_ttFI4

Daniel (@dungeondive) reviews two supplements: Trapped Within by Philip Jensen (a prison escape dungeon with two new classes) and Glimpses of a Dying World by Feral Wizard (a bestiary featuring curious encounters, mystical artifacts, rituals, and adventure sites). He highlights the beauty of these books as physical objects that inspire imagination while maintaining high-quality mechanics. Both supplements work seamlessly with Mork Borg to create memorable encounters and narrative hooks.

----

Which supplement's adventure or encounter design has most inspired your own game prep, and what made it stick with you?
